[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00111010 4
1 10011010 4
2 00001111 4
3 00100110 3
4 11111001 6
5 11110100 5
6 01001010 3
7 00001111 4

01 10 11001101 5
12 21 10100000 2
23 32 10010101 4
34 43 00101001 3
45 54 00101000 2
56 65 11000000 2
67 76 00011110 4
70 07 00100111 4

02 20 01101101 5
13 31 00110101 4
24 42 10111100 5
35 53 00000001 1
46 64 11101000 4
57 75 11011110 6
60 06 00111001 4
71 17 11101010 5

03 30 11111000 5
14 41 00011100 3
25 52 10010100 3
36 63 11000001 3
47 74 11110110 6
50 05 11111001 6 match 4
61 16 11110100 5 match 5
72 27 01001010 3 match 6

04 40 11010001 4
15 51 00110100 3
26 62 01010100 3
37 73 11011111 7
